name: Ethena Protocol
purpose: To provide a delta-neutral synthetic dollar (USDe) backed by staked Ethereum that generates sustainable yield for holders through staking rewards and perpetual funding rates.
description: Ethena is a decentralized finance protocol that enables users to mint USDe, a synthetic dollar stablecoin backed by staked Ethereum. The protocol maintains delta neutrality through perpetual futures positions, generating yield from both Ethereum staking rewards and perpetual funding rates. Users can mint USDe by depositing collateral, stake their USDe to earn protocol yield, and participate in governance through the ENA token. The system includes sophisticated risk management through access controls, blacklisting mechanisms, and emergency response capabilities.
domain: Decentralized Finance (DeFi) - Synthetic Assets & Yield Generation

key_features.name: USDe Minting & Redemption
key_features.description: Atomic minting and redemption of USDe tokens through EIP-712 signed orders with collateral deposits and multi-route support

key_features.name: USDe Staking
key_features.description: ERC4626-based vault for staking USDe to earn protocol yield with vesting periods, blacklist support, and reward distribution

key_features.name: LP Token Staking
key_features.description: Epoch-based staking system for liquidity providers in USDe pools with cooldown periods and airdrop shard allocation

key_features.name: Governance (ENA)
key_features.description: ERC20 governance token with controlled inflation (max 10% annually) and ownership-based minting controls

key_features.name: Access Control System
key_features.description: Role-based access control with multiple permission levels including minter, redeemer, collateral manager, and emergency gatekeeper roles

key_features.name: Risk Management
key_features.description: Blacklisting mechanisms, cooldown periods, emergency shutdown capabilities, and insurance fund integration
